title: Trajectory, Tool Selection, Arguments, Effects, and Stop Evaluation
description: A final answer looks right even though the agent called an unauthorized tool, used wrong arguments, retried a write, skipped an approval, and never reached a valid terminal state. Learners cumulatively produce trajectory-aware agent evaluation harness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Capture observable state, interaction steps, tool calls and results, approvals, effects, retries, budgets, errors, and terminal reason without hidden-reasoning claims.
Choose exact, in-order, any-order, partial-order, forbidden-step, or state-invariant matching based on task semantics.
Measure required-tool recall, tool precision, unnecessary calls, forbidden calls, schema validity, argument correctness, and result use.
